dict.string: Fellship connects to your MeshCore radio over Bluetooth to send and receive mesh messages and to read the radio’s GPS position.

Your location is used to show your position on the map and to detect when you enter or leave a room’s boundary. It is shared only with rooms you join, and only when that room’s location sharing is turned on. It never goes to any server.
Background access lets Fellship notice zone entries and exits shortly after they happen, even when the app is not open. Location is never sent to any server.
The camera is used only to scan invite QR codes from nearby members.
